plan_name: Consolidated Meath County Development Plan 2021-2027 (as varied)
dm_location: Chapter 11 — Development Management Standards and Land Use Zoning Objectives
residential_density_dph: Per Sustainable Residential Development and Compact Settlements Guidelines 2024; at/above mid-density at central/accessible, below mid-range at peripheral (no fixed uph table)
plot_ratio: 1.0 indicative max at edge of town; 2.0 indicative max in town centre/core
separation_distance_m: 16 m between directly opposing rear/side windows above ground floor; 2.3 m between dwellings for full length of flanks
private_open_space: 20 m² (1 bed); 30 m² (2 bed); 40 m² (3 bed); 50 m² (4 bed)
public_open_space_pct: 15% of total site area (reducible to 10% net site area in exceptional circumstances)
car_parking_dwelling: Max 1.5 per dwelling at accessible locations; max 2 per dwelling at intermediate/peripheral locations
building_height: Increased height at identified locations; proposals over 6 storeys require statement per Urban Development and Building Heights Guidelines 2018
trigger_AA: Required where development could impact integrity of a Natura 2000 site; four phases (Screening, NIS, alternatives, IROPI)
trigger_EIA: EIAR required for Schedule 5 development exceeding threshold; EIA screening for certain proposals
trigger_FRA: Hydrology Appraisal/FRA among assessments for relevant proposals
trigger_AHIA: Architectural Assessment; controls on/near Protected Structures and within ACAs
trigger_EcIA: Ecology/Biodiversity Assessment (e.g. bat surveys), case-by-case at pre-application
trigger_VIA: Landscape Impact Assessment, case-by-case at pre-application
trigger_TTA: TTA where traffic exceeds 10% of flow (5% if congested); residential >100 dwellings; retail/leisure >1,000 sq.m; industrial >5,000 sq.m
notes: Rural one-off house standards, sightlines and wastewater NOT in Chapter 11 — cross-referenced to Chapter 9 (Rural Development Strategy) and TII. Pre-application consultation required for residential or non-residential >1,000 sq.m.
